title: Backlog Task Metadata
description: Vocabulary for indented metadata fields under a BACKLOG.md task. See .claude/docs/relevant-workflow-backlog.md.

scope.description: Technical areas. Multi-value, comma-separated, each backticked.

relates-to.description: Task relationships. Form: `<task-id>:<kind>`. Kinds: depends-on, independent-of, supersedes, split-from, relates-to.

source.description: Provenance pointer. Conventional forms: suggestions-box/<project>/<file>, session/<id>, issue/<num>, or external URL.

references.description: Pointers to read while working: code paths, prior PRs, design docs. Multi-value, comma-separated, each backticked.

notes.description: Free prose. Reserve for context that isn't a pointer.
